task_description: Pour the black powder into the mortar and grind.
subtasks: lift the test tube and move it over the mortar
pour the black powder into the mortar
release the test tube and reach for the pestle
bring the pestle over the mortar
grind the powder in the mortar
lift the pestle and return to rest
_sieve_note: Optional per-event window_half_s / state_confidence drive candidate_propose.py (SIEVE step 1). They are read directly from this JSON; load_schema() ignores unknown keys, so the framework is unaffected.
